channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Shields outpoints Perkins to win 1st undisputed heavyweight bout in women's boxing
item.description: FLINT, Mich. (AP) — Claressa Shields unanimously outpointed Danielle Perkins on Sunday night in the first undisputed heavyweight bout in women’s boxing to remain undefeated. Shields, a two-time Olympic gold medalist with titles in five divisions, was in control of the fight from the start.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Celtics rally from 26-point deficit to top 76ers 118-110
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored 13 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter and the Boston Celtics rallied from a 26-point deficit to beat the Philadelphia 76ers 118-110 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Luka Doncic heads to the Lakers and Anthony Davis goes to the Mavs in blockbuster trade
item.description: The trade was put together in secret, with only a precious few people knowing what was happening. Luka Doncic didn't know. Anthony Davis didn't know. Their coaches didn't know. Their teammates didn't know. And then it happened — an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Watch: Fans boo US national anthem at NHL game in Canada amid trade war
item.description: The booing came shortly after Trump signed an order imposing stiff tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kevin Durant says teams aren't held to same 'loyalty' expectations as players are after stunning NBA trade
item.description: After what may just be the most stunning and star-powered trade ever, Kevin Durant called out teams for their lack of loyalty to their players.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A 2,500th 3-pointer, a triple-double, Bronny's basket give LeBron James another memorable MSG game
item.description: A 2,500th 3-pointer for his career and his 10th triple-double this season. Not a bad 31st trip to Madison Square Garden for LeBron James. Pretty good first one for Bronny James, too.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Straka has late surge to regain Pebble Beach lead over Rory McIlroy and Shane Lowry
item.description: Sepp Straka watched his shot on the 10th sail over the cliff and onto the beach, starting a stretch of three straight bogeys. He rallied with four birdies over the final five holes to salvage a 2-under 70 and a one-shot lead over McIlroy and Shane Lowry.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU hits 14 three-pointers in fourth straight victory
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders made six of BYU's 14 3-pointers and scored 22 points to lead the Cougars to an 81-75 victory over UCF on Saturday for its fourth straight win. Mawot Mag added a season-high 19 points and matched a career-best with five assists for BYU (15-6, 6-4 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes fall to Oklahoma State, 81-72
item.description: STILLWATER, Okla. (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes are finding life on the road in the Big 12 tough in their first season in the conference.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz trade Mills and Eubanks for Bamba and Tucker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Five days before the NBA trade deadline, the Utah Jazz have made a deal with the Los Angeles Clippers. The Jazz have acquired center Mo Bamba, forward P.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Oceanside 36, La Costa Canyon 31
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball senior night for Oceanside hosting La Costa Canyon. Pirates squeak by the Mavericks 36-31.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Bolts' Geekie turning heads with unique pregame rituals
item.description: To steal a line from Michael Scott in "The Office," Conor Geekie isn't superstitious, but he is a little "stitious.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Local pro bull rider representing Navajo Nation
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Pro Bull Riders Tour is coming back to Salt Lake City next weekend for the Unleash the Beats event at the Delta Center. At this level, the relationship between bull rider and bull has to be in sync, like a wild dance.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: McDonald's announces Angel Reese Special, set to debut in February
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Angel Reese is set to add another first to her list of celebrity endorsements and accomplishments. In a post on X, fast food mega-chain McDonald's announced "The Angel Reese Special," will debut on Feb. 10 in collaboration with the Chicago Sky's star power forward.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
